description_long: A young adult male stands confidently, dressed in a sleeveless hooded vest layered over a graphic t-shirt, paired with distressed, rolled-up jeans. He wears dark sneakers and sports wristbands on both arms, adding to his urban, streetwise appearance. His face is partially covered by stylish sunglasses, and he has a closely cropped hairstyle. The vest features a bold graphic on the back, and the jeans are torn at the knees, giving a rugged, casual vibe. His posture is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and hands open at his sides. The overall look suggests a modern, fashion-conscious individual likely found in city environments.
description: A young adult male in a sleeveless hooded vest, graphic t-shirt, distressed jeans, and sneakers, accessorized with sunglasses and wristbands, exuding a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, sunglasses, sleeveless vest, graphic t-shirt, wristbands, and distressed jeans.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, arm musculature, and the rolled-up jeans with visible knee tears.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest with a bold graphic, the back of the jeans, and the overall stance.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg details, with the vest and jeans clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless hooded vest, graphic t-shirt, distressed rolled-up jeans, wristbands
